# allinkl_dns_records (Data Source)

Reads all DNS records of a KAS-hosted zone.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "allinkl_dns_records" "all" {
  zone = "example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `zone` (String) Zone host, e.g. `example.com`.

### Read-Only

- `records` (Attributes List) All records in the zone, including system records. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--records))

<a id="nestedatt--records"></a>
### Nested Schema for `records`

Read-Only:

- `aux` (Number) Auxiliary value (MX/SRV priority).
- `changeable` (Boolean) Whether KAS allows modifying this record.
- `data` (String) Record payload (IP, hostname or text content).
- `id` (String) Record id assigned by KAS.
- `name` (String) Record name relative to the zone; empty for the zone apex.
- `type` (String) Record type, e.g. `A`, `MX`, `TXT`.
